notes: Reviewed docs/roadmap.md, docs/releases/v2.md, and docs/releases/v2_tasks.md. Confirmed V2 execution plan: 4 phases covering tool routing accuracy (Phase 1), streaming tool continuity (Phase 2), grounded platform knowledge (Phase 3), and evaluation/release readiness (Phase 4). V2 explicitly excludes WhatsApp, Instagram, Email, Voice, autonomous actions, and complex auth. Existing V2 phase docs in .agent/impl_docs/ are fully aligned with v2.md scope and v2_tasks.md priorities. Session 7 (Phase 6) already delivered partial Phase 1 work: getCourseInventory tool and prompt routing rules. Updated tasks.md with V2 phase breakdown and updated progress.md. No V1 rework performed.
